spectralard 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
    • Linear-in-Means Estimation with 2SLS and ARD

Estimate a low-rank network model from Aggregated Relational Data (ARD)

Source: R/estimators.R
estimate_spectrum.Rd

Estimate a low-rank network model from Aggregated Relational Data (ARD)

Usage

estimate_spectrum(ard, traits)

Arguments

ard

A matrix containing Aggregated Relational Data. Each row of ard corresponds to one node in the network, and each column represents an aggregated trait. The order of the nodes (rows) and aggregated traits (columns) should match traits. Missing data is not allowed.

traits

A matrix containing node-level trait information. Each row of traits corresponds to one node in the network, and each column represents a particular trait. The order of the nodes (rows) and aggregated traits (columns) should match ard. Missing data is not allowed.

Value

A SpectralArdEstimate object.

Examples


set.seed(42)

# 1. Simulate ARD data
sim <- simulate_ard_data(
  n = 100, k = 2, corr = 0.7,
  num_good_traits = 2, num_bad_traits = 2
)

# 2. Estimate the network model
estimate <- estimate_spectrum(sim$ard, sim$traits)
estimate
#> 
#> ── Spectral ARD Estimate ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#> Nodes: 100
#> Latent dimensions: 4

# 3. Sample a new graph from the estimate
g <- sample_graph(estimate)
g
#> IGRAPH d198556 D--- 100 2454 -- 
#> + edges from d198556:
#>   [1]  2->1  3->1  4->1  5->1  6->1  7->1  8->1  9->1 10->1 11->1 12->1 13->1
#>  [13] 14->1 15->1 16->1 18->1 21->1 24->1 25->1 26->1 27->1 28->1 29->1 30->1
#>  [25] 31->1 32->1 33->1 37->1 38->1 40->1 42->1 43->1 44->1 45->1 47->1 48->1
#>  [37] 56->1 59->1 66->1 68->1 71->1 73->1 93->1  1->2  3->2  4->2  5->2  6->2
#>  [49]  7->2  8->2  9->2 10->2 11->2 12->2 13->2 14->2 15->2 16->2 17->2 18->2
#>  [61] 19->2 20->2 21->2 23->2 24->2 25->2 26->2 27->2 29->2 30->2 33->2 37->2
#>  [73] 38->2 40->2 42->2 43->2 45->2 48->2 51->2 54->2 56->2 65->2 76->2 79->2
#>  [85] 80->2 82->2 84->2 87->2  1->3  2->3  4->3  5->3  7->3  8->3  9->3 10->3
#>  [97] 11->3 12->3 13->3 15->3 16->3 21->3 22->3 23->3 24->3 25->3 26->3 27->3
#> + ... omitted several edges
